hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path').join(process.cwd(),'CLAUDE.md');if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.error('CLAUDE.md not found — GateTest requires it.');process.exit(1);}console.log('[GateTest] CLAUDE.md verified.');"
hooks.description: GateTest: Verify CLAUDE.md exists before running commands

hooks.command:
echo '
[GateTest] Session initialized. CLAUDE.md quality gate is ACTIVE.
All builds must pass every check in CLAUDE.md before shipping.
Run: node bin/gatetest.js --help for commands.
'
hooks.description: GateTest: Display session initialization message and enforce CLAUDE.md
